text_block_list.name: Red and White Captains
text_block_list.text: 『——Here we pledge!!』

text_block_list.name: Red and White Captains
text_block_list.text:
『We're gonna!』『We will!』 
『Give our all in this contest and compete to the fullest, 
fair and square!』

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text:
Whoooooaaaa, it's startiiiiiing!! 
Red or white!? Who should I cheer for? 
I can't wait!!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. Pokke! That outfit looks great on you. 
I have to say, I didn't expect the two of us would 
be facing off as captains.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: …Pokke? What's——

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
——Fuji-san. 
It's you against me today.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
I've always admired you. 
All this time, your footsteps've been my guiding light.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
So that's why today!! I'm gonna catch up to you, 
just you watch!!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
! 
…Pokke——

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ……All right. I accept your challenge.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Come at me, as hard as you can. 
——I'll welcome you with open arms!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Hmm… "Welcome you with open arms," huh. Not exactly what you'd expect to hear before a real no-holds-barred faceoff, is it?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Well, y'know how it is. 
I've always been just a disciple to her. 
Following behind her, trying to catch up.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: If I really wanna face her, one-on-one… I can't do that 'till I make her turn around and really see me.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
So, yeah… All right. ——Yo, red team!!!!! 
Let's bust some heads at this first event!!

text_block_list.name: Red Team Members
text_block_list.text: Yes, Captain Pokke!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the all-school Spring Fan Fest Team Battle has 
begun! It's Red versus White! 
And the first event is the uphill sprint!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
We usually use these hills for training, but this time they're 
going to be our racetrack!! Which of our two teams will be 
the first to leap up the slope and reach the finish line!?

text_block_list.name: Red Team Members
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAAAAAAAGH!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Heck yeah, that's the way! Go, go, GOOOOO!! 
Show me some spirit! Grit those teeth!! 
Don't let up till it's over!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
What's this!? Under Jungle Pocket's leadership, the red team's 
taken a massive lead! With powerful steps, the team just 
keeps climbing up and up and up!!!!

text_block_list.name: Red Team Uma A
text_block_list.text:
Huff… huff… huff……It hurts!! I can barely breathe!! 
But I'm gonna blow 'em away… all the way to the finish line…!!

text_block_list.name: Red Team Uma B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah… After all… We've seen her at practice, again and again, 
and again! We've seen our captain's back ahead of us, 
leading the way!

text_block_list.name: Red Team Uma C
text_block_list.text:
Let's show our spirit!! Our guts!! 
Tear it down the home stretch, just like 
our captain taught uuuuuuus!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
We have a winnerrrrr!! 
All the top finishes were on the red team, putting them one 
step ahead!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. That team sure is Pokke's, all right…! 
If it comes down to who's got the tougher spirit, they're 
going to be pretty hard to beat.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
……So you say… But I don't detect the slightest bit 
of concern in your expression.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha… It's only the first event, after all. 
First things first, I need to give our cute little teammates 
a sweet reward for all their hard work. After that——

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The next event's the 4000 meter variety obstacle race. That'll be our turn in the spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It's the white team!! The white team's in the lead, already 
making their counterattack!! Now it's their turn to dominate 
the placings on the 4000m obstacle course!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Good job, everyone, you're doing great! All that's left is 
the homestretch! Force them into a speed showdown now, 
and the win is yours!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Captain Fuji Kiseki skillfully unites all the different racers under 
her banner!! The white team's earned a whole bunch of points!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Dang! Well, I knew it wasn't gonna be that easy. 
Haha, Fuji-san's as awesome as ever…!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
All right, time for the next one. 
…You got this, Tap?

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Aye-aye! Leave it to me, Pokke. I'm gonna turn the tide!!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
All righty… Time for me to fire the first shot… 
Ready or not, here I come, Digital!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Bwahh!? D-d-d-did she just make eye contact w—— 
…No, no way. A true otaku should never think too much 
of herself…

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What's up, Digital? Are you doing all right? 
It's about time for the next event, so——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
AslkdjI'm sho sorry! 
I'll be right on it, ma'am, yes ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your humble servant Agnes Digital shall work from the back line 
and do her utmost in a feeble attempt to offer ye the smallest 
victory! I'll just watch from the back in the tug-of-war…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
"Feeble attempt" is a odd choice of words. What are we to do if 
the power you've trained on dirt can only muster a "feeble 
attempt"? Need I remind you, you are our ace in the tug-of-war.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And, might I add, in a tug-of-war, what you call the "back line" 
is in fact the converging point of all the vectors of force. That is 
to say, just go ahead and show what you can do, Digital-kun.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, that was a pretty complicated way of putting it—— 
But she's absolutely right, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You're the key to our victory. We're counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Okay, pull! Yo-ho! Yo-ho!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: A tug-of-war's all about rhythm, just like rowin' a boat!! Pull in time with my voice, go it!? Yo-ho! Yo-ho!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah, Tap!! 
Keep going, keep going…!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yo… Ho… Yo… Ho… O Captain my Captain Tap-san… 
Feel her rhythm… Yo… Ho… Yo… Ho…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Pull at the perfect moment… Yo… Ho… Yo… Ho… ——NOW!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: UMADACCHI!!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: What the…!?

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
A… Agnes Digital saw right through the red team! 
And her pulling force was incredible! Her skills have earned the 
white team a massive victory!!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Shoot! …Man, what did I expect? I mean, that crazy power's what helped you snatch up all those trophies…!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
——Heh. Now that's what I like to see, Digital!! 
It's on now!!
